title: Lead Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Instructional Designer in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
